ramp-api.$comment: Any request to the Ramp agent-tools API (production). Only the agent-tools API (/developer/v*/agent-tools/<tool>) is supported; the standard/regular Ramp REST API is NOT -- agent keys are barred from it, so no ramp-* permission grants it. This is the whole-service scope; grant a narrower ramp-<verb>-<resource> permission to limit what the agent can do.

ramp-read-all.$comment: Read anything from Ramp: every read capability across all resources (transactions, cards, bills, reimbursements, treasury, vendors, users, accounting, trips, limits, and more). Agent-tools reads are POST with a rationale body.

ramp-write-all.$comment: Create or modify anything in Ramp: every write capability across all resources (activate/lock cards, approve transactions & reimbursements, edit limits, issue funds, manage trips & vendors, pay via x402, and more). Agent-tools writes are POST with a rationale body.

ramp-read-accounting.$comment: Read accounting / analyst queries. Ramp agent-tools API (POST with a rationale body). Capabilities: execute analyst query, get analyst artifact status, get analyst catalog, get analyst metric metadata, get analyst spend facts domain docs, get analyst table domain docs, get tracking categories, get tracking category options.

ramp-read-ai-spend.$comment: Read AI token spend. Ramp agent-tools API (POST with a rationale body). Capabilities: get ai token spend aggregates, get ai token spend connections, get ai token spend current spend, get ai token spend filter options.

ramp-read-bills.$comment: Read bills. Ramp agent-tools API (POST with a rationale body). Capabilities: get bill amount summary, get bill comments, get bill details, get bill history, get bill invoices, get bill metrics, get bill status, get bills for approval, get draft bill details, get recurring bill, list bills, search bills.

ramp-read-cards.$comment: Read cards. Ramp agent-tools API (POST with a rationale body). Capabilities: enroll business in agent cards, get agent card creds, get agent card funds.

ramp-read-help-center.$comment: Read Ramp help-center articles. Ramp agent-tools API (POST with a rationale body). Capabilities: search help center snippets.

ramp-read-limits.$comment: Read spend limits & allocations. Ramp agent-tools API (POST with a rationale body). Capabilities: get funds, list cards.

ramp-read-memos.$comment: Read transaction memos. Ramp agent-tools API (POST with a rationale body). Capabilities: get transaction suggested memos.

ramp-read-purchase-orders.$comment: Read purchase orders. Ramp agent-tools API (POST with a rationale body). Capabilities: get purchase order details, search purchase orders.

ramp-read-reimbursements.$comment: Read out-of-pocket reimbursements. Ramp agent-tools API (POST with a rationale body). Capabilities: estimate mileage reimbursement, estimate per diem amount, get outstanding reimbursements by currency, get reimbursement receipts, get reimbursements, get reimbursements for approval, get user recent reimbursements, search reimbursements, search user reimbursements.

ramp-read-tasks.$comment: Read attention feed / tasks. Ramp agent-tools API (POST with a rationale body). Capabilities: get attention feed.

ramp-read-transactions.$comment: Read card transactions. Ramp agent-tools API (POST with a rationale body). Capabilities: answer policy question, get decline explanation, get full transaction metadata, get transaction missing items, get transactions.

ramp-read-treasury.$comment: Read treasury / business account balances. Ramp agent-tools API (GET). Capabilities: get account balance history, get investment account balance, get managed portfolio account balance, get ramp business account balance, get treasury balance history, list business accounts, list treasury accounts, list wallet transfers.

ramp-read-trips.$comment: Read travel & trips. Ramp agent-tools API (POST with a rationale body). Capabilities: get bookings, get candidate trips for transaction, get flight booking locations, get traveler profile, get user trips, search flights, submit flight booking.

ramp-read-unified-requests.$comment: Read unified requests (approvals inbox). Ramp agent-tools API (POST with a rationale body). Capabilities: get requests to review, get unified request details, search unified requests.

ramp-read-users.$comment: Read users & org chart. Ramp agent-tools API (POST with a rationale body). Capabilities: get org chart, get simplified user detail, list users, search user.

ramp-read-vendors.$comment: Read vendors. Ramp agent-tools API (GET/POST). Capabilities: get vendor agreement, get vendor document bulk status, list vendor agreements, search vendors.

ramp-write-approvals.$comment: Create or modify approval decisions. Ramp agent-tools API (POST with a rationale body). Capabilities: approve or reject request.

ramp-write-cards.$comment: Create or modify cards. Ramp agent-tools API (POST with a rationale body). Capabilities: activate card, lock or unlock card.

ramp-write-comments.$comment: Create or modify comments. Ramp agent-tools API (POST with a rationale body). Capabilities: post comment.

ramp-write-funds.$comment: Create or modify agent-card funds. Ramp agent-tools API (POST with a rationale body). Capabilities: issue one off funds.

ramp-write-limits.$comment: Create or modify spend limits & allocations. Ramp agent-tools API (POST with a rationale body). Capabilities: limit increase, lock or unlock spend allocation, lock or unlock spend allocation member, update category restrictions, update merchant restrictions, update transaction amount limit.

ramp-write-receipts.$comment: Create or modify receipts. Ramp agent-tools API (POST with a rationale body). Capabilities: attach receipt to transaction, mark transaction missing receipt, provide no receipt reason, upload receipt file.

ramp-write-reimbursements.$comment: Create or modify out-of-pocket reimbursements. Ramp agent-tools API (POST with a rationale body). Capabilities: approve or reject reimbursement, cancel reimbursement payment, create reimbursement from receipt, duplicate reimbursement, edit reimbursement, resubmit reimbursement, submit reimbursement.

ramp-write-transactions.$comment: Create or modify card transactions. Ramp agent-tools API (POST with a rationale body). Capabilities: approve or reject transaction, edit transaction, request transaction repayment.

ramp-write-trips.$comment: Create or modify travel & trips. Ramp agent-tools API (POST with a rationale body). Capabilities: create trip, update traveler profile.

ramp-write-vendors.$comment: Create or modify vendors. Ramp agent-tools API (POST with a rationale body). Capabilities: attach vendor document, bulk upload vendor documents.

ramp-write-x402.$comment: Create or modify x402 protocol payments. Ramp agent-tools API (POST with a rationale body). Capabilities: pay with x402.
